command:
cd ~/Documents/Projects/Hyo && python3 -c '
import json
with open("website/data/feed.json") as f:
    data = json.load(f)
print("today:", data.get("today"))
print("reports:", len(data.get("reports",[])))
for r in data.get("reports",[]):
    print("  " + r.get("id","?") + " | " + r.get("date","?") + " | " + r.get("type","?"))
'
